fabricTypes.name: Lace
fabricTypes.description: Delicate, open-weave fabric with intricate patterns. Perfect for evening wear, bridal gowns, and special occasion outfits.

fabricTypes.name: Satin
fabricTypes.description: Lustrous, smooth fabric with a glossy surface and dull back. Ideal for blouses, dresses, and elegant evening wear.

fabricTypes.name: Beaded Lace
fabricTypes.description: Hand-beaded lace with intricate embroidery and embellishments. Premium choice for luxury and ceremonial attire.

fabricTypes.name: Ankara
fabricTypes.description: Vibrant, colourful cotton fabric with bold African prints. Durable, breathable, and perfect for everyday and ceremonial wear.

fabricTypes.name: Mikado
fabricTypes.description: Crisp, structured fabric with a subtle sheen. A popular choice for bridal gowns, evening dresses, and tailored pieces.

fabricTypes.name: Silk
fabricTypes.description: Luxurious, natural protein fibre fabric prized for its softness, breathability, and natural sheen.

fabricTypes.name: Jonkuso
fabricTypes.description: Traditional Nigerian fabric with raised textured patterns woven directly into the material. Known for its rich cultural significance.

fabricTypes.name: Other
fabricTypes.description: Browse our collection of specialty fabrics including cotton, velvet, chiffon, organza, and more.

fabrics.name: Premium French Lace
fabrics.description: Exquisite French lace with delicate floral patterns on a soft mesh base. Each yard features intricate scalloped edges and a luxurious drape. Our Premium French Lace is sourced directly from the finest mills in France, ensuring authentic quality. The fine netting provides a comfortable fit while the embroidered motifs add an elegant dimension. Perfect for bridal veils, reception dresses, and statement evening gowns. Available in a range of sophisticated colours from classic ivory and champagne to bold jewel tones.

fabrics.name: Classic Ankara Print
fabrics.description: Vibrant Ankara fabric featuring bold, traditional African prints on 100% premium cotton. Our Ankara is milled in Nigeria using high-quality wax print techniques that ensure deep, lasting colour. The fabric is breathable, durable, and easy to care for — making it ideal for both everyday wears and special occasions. Each pattern tells a unique story inspired by African heritage. Use it for blouses, skirts, dresses, head wraps, and bespoke tailoring. Multiple yards recommended for complete outfits.

fabrics.name: Luxury Silk Charmeuse
fabrics.description: Pure mulberry silk charmeuse with an ultra-smooth, lustrous surface that drapes beautifully. This 22-momme weight silk offers the perfect balance of luxury and durability. Charmeuse silk is characterized by its satin weave construction, giving it a glossy front and matte back. Naturally temperature-regulating and hypoallergenic, this fabric glides against the skin for unparalleled comfort. Ideal for silk blouses, flowing dresses, lingerie, luxury bedding, and as lining fabric for high-end garments.
